title: 10 best herbal creams for insomnia
description: Soapwort creams helps with insomnia because of its unique ability to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation. The natural saponins in soapwort have a soothing effect on the skin, reducing stress and anxiety that often contributes to difficulty falling asleep. Additionally, the creamy texture provides gentle moisturizing properties, calming the skin and mind, allowing individuals to drift off to sleep more easily.
